acceptance_matrix.reason: Agent works with 16 fixture cases, 54 tests, all pass. helpers.py and labels.py via evolve-agent runs (OpenCode server writes). Core agent code Stage A (pre-existing). Provenance artifacts in phase_3_example_agents/provenance/clothing_advice_agent/

Agent works with 15 fixture cases, 49 tests, all pass. helpers.py and labels.py via evolve-agent runs (OpenCode server writes). Core agent code Stage A (pre-existing). Provenance artifacts in phase_3_example_agents/provenance/daily_planning_agent/
Provenance records exist for pipeline-generated files (helpers.py, labels.py) in both clothing and planning agent provenance directories

9/10: Main system works, all agents function, all tests pass (305+). Known limitation: pipeline patch-application mechanism not fully exercised (OpenCode server writes files directly rather than through structured patch governance). Governance artifacts manually documented.

score_justification: Per scoring rubric: Main system works, all agents functional, all tests pass. Pipeline patch-application mechanism has a documented limitation (OpenCode server writes directly rather than through structured patch application). Governance artifacts manually documented rather than pipeline-produced. BUILTIN_TIMEOUT fixed from 0 to 120s. All 28 acceptance criteria pass with noted limitations.
